prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm candlelight falls on an aged man at the left while a cold dark light with a ringed eclipse falls on a crucified figure at the right across a band of deep shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
At the left, an aged man with a grey beard is seated at a table, a feather pen at rest on a wet-inked scroll, a single candle glowing. At the right, across a dark divide, the crucified Christ is robed on a wooden cross beneath a black noon sky, a ringed eclipse sun and distant crosses on the dark hill beyond. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the seated man at his candle at left, the crucified figure at right.

Cut to mid framing — the man's grieving face and the scroll in candlelight.

Cut to insert — the feather pen at rest on the wet-inked scroll.

Cut to insert — the small candle flame.

Cut to upper framing — the crucified Christ on the cross beneath the black sky.

Cut to close-up — the bowed head of the crucified figure.

Cut to insert — the ringed eclipse sun beyond.

Return to full composition.

End hold spanning the writer at his candle and the far cross.

Micro-motion:
- minimal
- candle flame stirs as painted light only

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Solemn wonder across a thousand years.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no halo added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image
